_note: Sidecar for the Anthem of the Seas deck-plans article. Every claim verified in-session via WebFetch on 2026-06-17 by the lead (re-fetched independently of the research subagents). Royal Caribbean's own deck-plan page is JavaScript-rendered and yielded no machine-readable deck data, so deck-level detail rests on CruiseMapper + cruisedeckplans (cross-checked) and top-line specs on Wikipedia. The article does NOT claim Royal Caribbean as the source for deck-level detail and links readers to RC's official interactive plans as the canonical check. No claim is taken from training data or from another file in this repo.
verified_by: Claude (operator-supervised); two research subagents gathered, lead re-verified every authoritative claim against the source URL
verification_session: Deck-plans article build 2026-06-17. Pre-trip research framing: author sails Anthem within ~2 weeks; no first-hand Anthem experience claimed.

class.value: Quantum-class (the second of five Quantum-class ships)

gross_tonnage.notes: ship-technology.com reports 167,800t (likely displacement, different basis); 168,666 GT used as the registered figure.

length_beam.value: 347.06 m / 1,138 ft 8 in long; 49.4 m / 162 ft 1 in beam (max)

decks.source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Anthem_of_the_Seas (16 total / 14 passenger-accessible) + https://www.cruisemapper.com/deckplans/Anthem-of-the-Seas-801 (16 decks, 15 accessible, 9 with cabins)
decks.notes: Wikipedia and CruiseMapper agree on 16 total decks and 9 cabin decks; they differ on accessible-deck count (14 vs 15). Article uses 16 total / 9 cabin decks (both sources agree) and Wikipedia's 14 accessible. The repo file assets/data/ships/rcl/anthem-of-the-seas.page.json records decks_total:18 / decks_guest:16, which contradicts every external source and is logged for separate correction in admin/UNFINISHED_TASKS.md (P2, 2026-06-17). The repo figure is NOT propagated into the article.

capacity.notes: CruiseMapper reports 4,168 / 4,825 (outlier). 4,180 matches both Wikipedia and the existing repo ship page text.

deck_layout._source_primary: https://www.cruisemapper.com/deckplans/Anthem-of-the-Seas-801 (deck names + venue decks) cross-checked against https://www.cruisedeckplans.com/ships/deckbydeck.php?ship=Anthem-of-the-Seas&deck=N per-deck pages
deck_layout._official_reference: https://www.royalcaribbean.com/cruise-ships/anthem-of-the-seas/deck-plans (JS-rendered template — WebFetch returns only {{ deck.name }} placeholders, confirmed 2026-06-17 — so not machine-readable; linked for readers as canonical)
deck_layout._primary_source_verification_2026_06_17: Operator supplied two screenshots of the RENDERED royalcaribbean.com deck-plan interface (IMG_2408, IMG_2409). These confirm, from Royal Caribbean's own page: (1) the deck selector runs Deck Three through Deck Sixteen (14 decks), matching the 14-passenger-accessible figure; (2) Deck Three carries a 'Spacious Ocean View - Accessible' stateroom category — extra square footage, in-stateroom window, up to 4 guests, one Royal King bed convertible to two twins. This upgrades the Deck 3 stateroom claim and the accessible-ocean-view detail from secondary-provider corroboration to primary-source (RC) confirmation.

cabin_decks.source: CruiseMapper + cruisedeckplans (both providers agree); matches CruiseMapper 'nine decks with cabins'

marquee_venue_decks.value: North Star: deck 15 (access) / deck 16 (top); RipCord by iFly: deck 16; FlowRider: deck 16; SeaPlex: decks 15-16; Two70: decks 5-7; pools, Windjammer Marketplace, Coastal Kitchen, H2O Zone, Solarium (upper): deck 14; Solarium (lower): deck 13; main dining (The Grande, Chic), Royal Theatre, Music Hall, Casino Royale: deck 3; Royal Esplanade, shops, Sorrento's, Cafe Promenade: deck 4; specialty dining (Jamie's, Wonderland, Chops, Izumi), Bionic Bar, Schooner Bar: deck 5; Adventure Ocean (kids): decks 11-12; Bridge + Concierge Club: deck 12; Library + The Workshop: deck 6; Spa + teen disco + sports court: deck 15
marquee_venue_decks.source: https://www.cruisemapper.com/deckplans/Anthem-of-the-Seas-801 (lead re-fetch 2026-06-17 confirmed North Star 15, RipCord 16, FlowRider 16, SeaPlex 15-16, Two70 5-7, pools 14) + per-deck cruisedeckplans pages (Deck 14 venue list incl. Windjammer Marketplace; Deck 3 main dining)

obstructed_balconies_deck_6.claim: On Deck 6, balcony categories 1E, 2E and 2F have views obstructed by the top of a lifeboat; staterooms 6254, 6258, 6654 and 6658 are specifically noted as obstructed. Deck 6 staterooms run even-numbered the length of the deck, aft-most 6310 (port) / 6710 (starboard); forward balconies both sides have larger unobstructed verandas.
obstructed_balconies_deck_6.source: Obstruction designation + named cabins: https://www.cruisedeckplans.com/ships/deckbydeck.php?ship=Anthem-of-the-Seas&deck=6 (lead re-fetch 2026-06-17, verbatim: 'Category 1E and 2E (was DO) and 2F (was SB) is obstructed by view of top of lifeboat.' and 'Staterooms 6254 6258 6654 and 6658 have obstructed views.'). Range + forward-veranda note: https://www.cruisemapper.com/deckplans/Anthem-of-the-Seas-801/deck06-1367 (verbatim 'Cruise cabins from 6118 to 6710' and 'most-forward located balcony cabins ... are with larger verandas and unobstructed sea views').
obstructed_balconies_deck_6.notes: Categories 1E/2E also appear on Decks 7 and 13. FULL DECK-6 PRIMARY-SOURCE WALK: operator supplied a fore-to-aft series of royalcaribbean.com Deck 6 screenshots (IMG_2410-2419, 2026-06-17). Verified from RC's own plan: even numbering throughout; aft-most cabins 6310 (port) / 6710 (starboard) with Library + The Workshop aft; forward suites begin ~6138 (port) / 6538 (starboard) in the captured shots (cabins forward of 6138 not yet confirmed on-screen, so the absolute forward-most is pending; CruiseMapper's '6118' low end is therefore NOT used in the article). The plan skips 6256 and 6656 at the obstructed-cabin cluster. IMG_2411 captured RC's LEGEND: a porthole icon = 'These staterooms have obstructed views' and a wheelchair icon = accessible staterooms. This UPGRADES the obstruction designation from CruiseDeckPlans-secondary to RC-primary: RC's own plan marks obstructed cabins with an icon; CruiseDeckPlans supplied the specific named cabins (6254/6258/6654/6658), consistent with RC's mid-deck markings. Earlier '6042 forward' note retracted — that was a misread of 6242.

deck_7_aft_inside_two70_noise.claim: Aft inside cabins on Deck 7 sit above the Two70 lounge and may hear noise during show times
deck_7_aft_inside_two70_noise.source: https://www.cruisedeckplans.com/ships/deckbydeck.php?ship=Anthem-of-the-Seas&deck=7 (lead re-fetch 2026-06-17, verbatim: 'Aft inside cabins are above Two70 lounge and may hear noise from that area during show times.')

deck_3_accessible_ocean_view.claim: Deck 3 has a Spacious Ocean View (Accessible) stateroom category with extra square footage, an in-stateroom window, capacity up to 4, one Royal King bed convertible to two twins
deck_3_accessible_ocean_view.source: royalcaribbean.com Anthem deck-plan interface, Deck Three view (operator screenshots IMG_2408/IMG_2409, 2026-06-17) — primary source

opinion_grade._handling: Framed in the article as common-cruiser guidance / what the layout suggests, explicitly to be confirmed from aboard. NOT stated as verified fact. Sources are advice blogs, not deck-plan providers.

quietest_midship_8_10.claim: Midship cabins on Decks 8-10 are generally the quietest and steadiest

motion_forward_high.claim: Motion is felt most in forward and high cabins; least midship and low
motion_forward_high.disposition: opinion / general principle, framed as such

below_pool_deck_13.claim: Deck 13 cabins sit below the Deck 14 pool/Windjammer area and may hear early-morning deck-chair and prep noise

near_kids_clubs_11_12.claim: Forward Decks 11-12 are near Adventure Ocean kids' areas
near_kids_clubs_11_12.source: cruisemummy (opinion) + Adventure Ocean deck location confirmed authoritative on CruiseMapper Decks 11-12
near_kids_clubs_11_12.disposition: location authoritative; noise inference framed as opinion

deck_3_entertainment_noise.claim: Deck 3 cabins share the deck with the Royal Theatre, Music Hall and Casino Royale; light sleepers should look twice at Decks 3, 6 and 13
deck_3_entertainment_noise.source: Venue locations authoritative (CruiseMapper Deck 3). 'Cabins to avoid... decks 3, 6 and 13' is opinion/UGC guidance corroborated via WebSearch 2026-06-17 (cruiseline.com / cruisemapper cabin guidance).
deck_3_entertainment_noise.disposition: venue locations authoritative; light-sleeper grouping framed as guidance

discarded_claims.claim: Cabins near the Windjammer on Deck 8 / cabins 14600-14680 to avoid
discarded_claims.reason: Windjammer is on Deck 14 (verified) and Deck 14 has no staterooms (verified, lead re-fetch of cruisedeckplans Deck 14, 2026-06-17). The 'Deck 8 near Windjammer' framing and the '14xxx' cabin numbers from cruisesnooze are wrong; not used.

establishing_photo.notes: Reused existing verified asset (no new image created). Full broadside with North Star pod visible. Attribution rendered on-page.

voice_audit.authorship_mode: Research synthesis with pre-trip framing. Author has NOT yet sailed Anthem; the article discloses this in-body (boards in ~2 weeks; will update from aboard). No first-hand Anthem lived-experience claimed. A v2 lived-experience revision is planned post-sailing.

machine_tells.notes: To be finalized against the shipped draft.

must_be_present.honest_limitation_acknowledged: Yes — the central 'I have not sailed her yet; this is my own pre-cruise homework' framing, plus the authoritative-vs-suggested split on cabin noise.
must_be_present.real_numbers: Strong — deck counts, GT, capacity, specific cabin numbers, venue decks.
must_be_present.from_the_pier_specificity: Deck-level: named venues per deck, named obstructed cabins.

voice_audit.risk_rating_justification: No lived-experience overclaim (the chief risk for a pre-trip article is fabricated firsthand detail; avoided by explicit disclosure). Facts are cited; opinion is labeled. To be re-confirmed against the shipped draft before commit.
voice_audit.outstanding_drift_notes: Re-run voice-audit against the final HTML body before commit; update counts here if any tell surfaces.
